playercontrolpp.gui.title: PlayerControl++ Config
playercontrolpp.config.hotkeys.comment.q: Quick turn by the configured angle.
Turn angle in degrees for Quick Turn.
Delay in ticks between closing one container and opening the next during auto-caching. Range: 1-200, default: 1.
Litematica render layer increment amount after each route cycle.
playercontrolpp.config.hotkeys.comment.o: Open the config GUI. Default: P + C.
playercontrolpp.gui.route.title: Route Flow System
playercontrolpp.gui.route.name: Name
playercontrolpp.gui.route.no_selection: Select a route on the left to edit.
playercontrolpp.gui.recording.title: Recording & Playback
playercontrolpp.gui.recording.hp_warn: ! HP MODE ACTIVE - tracks exact position each frame, larger files, higher replay accuracy !
playercontrolpp.gui.baritone.warning: WARNING: This mode is a cheat feature. If using on a multiplayer server, ensure you have the server owner or admin's consent.
playercontrolpp.config.hotkeys.comment.b: Toggle auto material gathering from projections using Baritone + ChestTracker.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.mods_mi: [PlayerControl++] Missing Baritone / Litematica / ChestTracker - all three mods are required for auto material gathering.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.complet: [PlayerControl++] Material gathering complete. Please collect remaining materials manually if needed.
[PlayerControl++] Material gathering complete - inventory full. Please clear inventory and try again.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.no_hud: [PlayerControl++] Please enable the Material List Info HUD in Litematica first.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.invento: [PlayerControl++] Inventory is full. Please clear some space first.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.pathing: [PlayerControl++] Pathfinding stuck or failed. Please change position and try again.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.item_mi: [PlayerControl++] Item '%s' not found in cached chests. Please prepare manually.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.range_i: [PlayerControl++] ChestTracker search range or item list range is set to infinite. Please set a finite range.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.no_mate: [PlayerControl++] Failed to get material list. Please make sure the Info HUD is enabled.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.all_mat: [PlayerControl++] All materials ready, no gathering needed.
When enabled, items in the Global Ignore List will be skipped during auto-gathering.
When enabled, automatically store gathered building materials into shulker boxes when inventory is full, then resume auto-gathering.

How to store materials into shulker boxes.
Simulate: place/open/mine the shulker box normally.
QuickShulker: open directly from inventory via QuickShulker API (requires QuickShulker mod on both client and server).
Items to ignore during auto-gathering. Click to open the list editor. Default: minecraft:water_bucket + all shulker box variants.
playercontrolpp.message.baritone.shulker: [PlayerControl++] Inventory full — storing materials to shulker box...
[PlayerControl++] Shulker box storage complete, resuming gathering.
[PlayerControl++] No usable shulker box found in inventory. Stopped.
[PlayerControl++] No valid position to place shulker box. Stopped.
[PlayerControl++] Failed to mine shulker box. Stopped.
[PlayerControl++] Failed to place shulker box. Stopped.
[PlayerControl++] Failed to open placed shulker box — aborting to prevent damage to surroundings.
[PlayerControl++] Shulker box not picked up within 5 seconds — stopping auto-gathering to prevent item loss.
playercontrolpp.config.hotkeys.comment.a: Toggle auto-caching of nearby container contents for ChestTracker.
playercontrolpp.config.cache_nearby.name: Cachable Container Whitelist
playercontrolpp.config.cache_nearby.comm: List of container Block IDs that can be auto-cached. Click to open the list editor. Default: all vanilla storage containers.
playercontrolpp.message.cache_nearby.all: [PlayerControl++] All nearby containers cached. Stopping in 3 seconds...
playercontrolpp.message.cache_nearby.aut: [PlayerControl++] Auto Cache Nearby Containers: Stopped (all nearby containers cached)
playercontrolpp.message.cache_nearby.wor: [PlayerControl++] Auto Cache Nearby Containers: OFF (world changed)
playercontrolpp.config.hotkeys.comment.w: Toggle auto water filling for waterloggable blocks in Litematica schematics.
Scan radius in blocks for finding waterloggable blocks. Clamped to player reach distance. Range: 0-5, default: 5.
Delay in ticks between water fill operations. Range: 1-200, default: 1.
playercontrolpp.message.water_fill.no_sc: [PlayerControl++] No Litematica schematic loaded. Auto Water Fill stopped.
playercontrolpp.message.water_fill.no_bu: [PlayerControl++] No water bucket found in inventory. Auto Water Fill stopped.
playercontrolpp.message.water_fill.compl: [PlayerControl++] All waterloggable blocks filled. Auto Water Fill stopped.
playercontrolpp.message.recording.corrup: [PlayerControl++] Recording file is corrupt or damaged and cannot be loaded.
